diagrams.title: Oceanic Zones Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the five main zones of the ocean from surface to deepest trenches with depth markers and characteristics
diagrams.purpose: Understanding vertical stratification of ocean environments and where different marine life exists

diagrams.title: Marine Food Web
diagrams.description: Pyramid structure showing trophic levels from producers to apex predators
elements: Third level: Small fish and squid
Fourth level: Larger fish and marine mammals
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing energy flow and food relationships in oceanic ecosystems

diagrams.title: Ocean Upwelling Process
diagrams.description: Cross-sectional view showing how nutrient-rich deep water rises to replace surface water
elements: Prevailing winds blowing parallel to coast
Ekman transport moving surface water away from coast
Cold, nutrient-rich water rising from depth
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how nutrients are recycled and why upwelling zones are biologically productive
